functional_summary.en: The putamen is a dorsal striatal territory strongly tied to motor habit, action selection, and learned sensorimotor routines.
functional_summary.zh: 壳核是背侧纹状体区域，与运动习惯、动作选择和习得性感觉运动程序密切相关。

connectivity_summary.en: It receives broad cortical input and returns influence through pallidal, nigral, and thalamic relays in cortico-basal-ganglia loops.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它接收广泛皮层输入，并经苍白球、黑质和丘脑中继反馈到皮质-基底节环路。

functional_summary.en: The caudate nucleus participates in associative striatal processing, linking goals, rules, and action selection.
functional_summary.zh: 尾状核参与联合型纹状体处理，把目标、规则与动作选择连接起来。

functional_summary.en: The nucleus accumbens integrates reward, motivation, and action vigor within ventral striatal circuitry.
functional_summary.zh: 伏隔核在腹侧纹状体环路中整合奖赏、动机和行动活力。

connectivity_summary.en: It receives limbic and prefrontal inputs and influences pallidal-thalamic routes that convert value into behavior.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它接收边缘与前额叶输入，并影响苍白球-丘脑通路，把价值转化为行为。

functional_summary.en: The globus pallidus external segment serves as a key relay of the indirect basal-ganglia pathway and contains neurons that feed back to the neostriatum while shaping motor-related pallidal firing.
functional_summary.zh: 苍白球外侧段是基底节间接通路的关键中继，既包含回投纹状体的神经元，也参与塑造与运动相关的苍白球放电模式。

connectivity_summary.en: In macaques, GPe is embedded in reciprocal loops with striatum and subthalamic nucleus, allowing cortical drive to reach pallidal neurons rapidly through the cortico-subthalamo-pallidal route.
connectivity_summary.zh: 在猕猴中，GPe 处于与纹状体和丘脑底核的往返环路中，使皮层驱动能够通过皮层-丘脑底核-苍白球通路快速影响苍白球神经元。

connectivity_summary.en: Its strongest documented outputs reach ventral thalamic and brainstem targets, while cortical influence can reach GPi rapidly through the subthalamic nucleus.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其最明确的输出通向腹侧丘脑和脑干目标，而皮层影响也可经丘脑底核快速传入 GPi。

functional_summary.en: SNpr is a basal-ganglia output nucleus that gates downstream motor and orienting commands.
functional_summary.zh: SNpr 是基底节输出核团，负责门控下游运动和定向指令。

connectivity_summary.en: It receives striatal input and projects toward thalamic and brainstem targets, helping close basal-ganglia loops.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它接收纹状体输入，并投向丘脑与脑干目标，帮助闭合基底节环路。

functional_summary.en: Substantia nigra pars compacta is the dopaminergic midbrain component most directly linked to nigrostriatal modulation, with macaque work showing organized projections to distinct striatal territories.
functional_summary.zh: 黑质致密部是与黑质-纹状体调制最直接相关的多巴胺中脑成分，猕猴研究显示它向不同纹状体亚区发出有组织的投射。

functional_summary.en: The ventral pallidum is a ventral-striatal output territory that links motivational value to action vigor, and macaque recordings show strong encoding of expected reward and drive.
functional_summary.zh: 腹侧苍白球是腹侧纹状体的输出区，负责把动机价值连接到行动活力；猕猴记录显示其对预期奖赏和驱动力具有强编码。

functional_summary.en: The anterior ventral nucleus is part of the anterior thalamic memory system and, in macaques, is strongly linked to retrosplenial and posterior cingulate inputs associated with spatial and contextual cognition.
functional_summary.zh: 前腹侧核属于前丘脑记忆系统，在猕猴中与后压后皮层和后扣带输入联系紧密，支持空间与情境认知。

connectivity_summary.en: Its connectivity profile overlaps substantially with laterodorsal and retrosplenial circuits, with especially dense inputs from areas 29 and 30 rather than a generic medial-thalamic pattern.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它的连接谱与背外侧核和后压后皮层环路高度重叠，尤以来自 29 区和 30 区的稠密输入最为明确，而不是泛化的内侧丘脑模式。

connectivity_summary.en: It participates in bilateral mesial-thalamic and prefrontal connectivity, making it more than a generic anterior-thalamic neighbor of AV.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它参与双侧的内侧丘脑-前额叶连接，因此并不只是 AV 旁边的一个泛化前丘脑邻区。

functional_summary.en: The ventral anterior nucleus parvicellular division is a pallidal-recipient motor thalamic parcel that helps route basal-ganglia signals toward premotor and supplementary motor territories.
functional_summary.zh: 腹前核小细胞部是一个接受苍白球输入的运动丘脑分区，负责把基底节信号导向前运动区和辅助运动区。

connectivity_summary.en: In behaving monkeys, pallidal-recipient neurons were found in VApc, and tracing studies showed VApc projections to postarcuate premotor cortex and SMA through both superficial and deep thalamocortical terminations.
connectivity_summary.zh: 在行为猕猴中，VApc 内可记录到接受苍白球输入的神经元；示踪研究还显示 VApc 投向弓状沟后前运动皮层和 SMA，并具有浅层与深层两类丘脑皮层终止形式。

functional_summary.en: The ventral anterior nucleus magnocellular division is a primate-specialized thalamic parcel and a major recipient of nigrothalamic projections.
functional_summary.zh: 腹前核大细胞部是灵长类特有的丘脑分区，也是黑质-丘脑投射的重要接受区。

functional_summary.en: The lateral dorsal nucleus is a retrosplenial-linked thalamic parcel implicated in spatial memory and contextual processing in macaques.
functional_summary.zh: 背外侧核是一个与后压后皮层紧密相连的丘脑分区，在猕猴中与空间记忆和情境处理相关。

connectivity_summary.en: Its strongest documented links are with posterior cingulate and retrosplenial cortices, giving it an AV-like mnemonic connectivity profile rather than a diffuse association-thalamus label.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其最明确的连接对象是后扣带和后压后皮层，因此它更像具备 AV 风格的记忆性连接谱，而不是一个弥散的联合丘脑标签。

connectivity_summary.en: Its reciprocal connectivity with prefrontal and limbic cortices makes it a relay and coordinator rather than a passive waypoint.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它与前额叶和边缘皮层双向互联，因此更像中继兼协调者，而不是被动驿站。

functional_summary.en: The mediodorsal nucleus parvicellular division is a prefrontal-associated thalamic parcel that contributes to cognitive control and flexible behavior through reciprocal frontal interactions.
functional_summary.zh: 背内侧核小细胞部是一个与前额叶相关的丘脑分区，通过与额叶的往返相互作用参与认知控制和行为灵活性。

functional_summary.en: The ventral lateral caudal nucleus is a motor thalamic parcel that sits across the transition between cerebellar- and pallidal-recipient territories in macaques.
functional_summary.zh: 腹外侧尾侧核是一个运动丘脑分区，在猕猴中跨越小脑接受区与苍白球接受区的过渡带。

functional_summary.en: The ventral lateral oral nucleus is a pallidal-recipient motor thalamic parcel involved in selecting and relaying basal-ganglia output to frontal motor cortex.
functional_summary.zh: 腹外侧口侧核是一个接受苍白球输入的运动丘脑分区，参与把基底节输出选择性地中继到额叶运动皮层。

connectivity_summary.en: In macaques, short-latency pallidal-recipient neurons localize to VLo, and thalamocortical tracing places VLo among the motor thalamic nuclei projecting to frontal motor areas.
connectivity_summary.zh: 在猕猴中，具有短潜伏期苍白球输入的神经元定位于 VLo，而丘脑皮层示踪也把 VLo 归入投向额叶运动区的运动丘脑核群。

functional_summary.en: The ventral posterior inferior nucleus is a posterior ventral-thalamic parcel that in macaques is linked to spinothalamic and vestibular signaling rather than to a generic somatosensory relay alone.
functional_summary.zh: 腹后下核是腹侧后丘脑中的一个后部核团，在猕猴中与脊髓丘脑和前庭信号相关，而不只是一个泛化的体感中继。

functional_summary.en: The parvicellular division of the ventral posterior medial nucleus is the macaque gustatory thalamic relay, carrying taste-dominant but not purely unimodal oral information.
functional_summary.zh: 腹后内侧核小细胞部是猕猴的味觉丘脑中继，传递以味觉为主、但并非纯单模态的口腔信息。

functional_summary.en: The centromedian nucleus is a posterior intralaminar thalamic parcel that helps broadcast behaviorally significant sensory events into primate basal-ganglia circuits.
functional_summary.zh: 中央中核是后部板内丘脑核团，负责把具有行为意义的感觉事件广播到灵长类基底节环路中。

functional_summary.en: The parafascicular nucleus is an intralaminar thalamic parcel that routes associative, limbic, and viscerosensory information into the primate striatum.
functional_summary.zh: 束旁核是板内丘脑核团中的一个分区，负责把联合性、边缘性和内脏感觉信息导入灵长类纹状体。

functional_summary.en: The lateral geniculate nucleus relays retinal signals with distinct sustained and transient response classes in macaque.
functional_summary.zh: 外侧膝状体在猕猴中中继视网膜信号，并包含持续型与瞬时型反应类别。

connectivity_summary.en: Macaque recordings also show that cortical feedback can alter LGN spatial tuning, placing it in a reciprocal visual loop rather than a purely passive relay.
connectivity_summary.zh: 猕猴记录还显示皮层反馈能够改变 LGN 的空间调谐，说明它位于往返视觉环路中，而不是纯被动中继。

functional_summary.en: The lateral habenular nucleus carries negative motivational value signals in behaving primates and is directly implicated in aversive outcome and non-reward processing.
functional_summary.zh: 外侧缰核在行为中的灵长类中编码负性动机价值，并直接参与厌恶结果与未获奖赏信息处理。

connectivity_summary.en: Macaque work links LHb to a striatal-pallido-habenular circuit and to downstream rostromedial tegmental routes that influence dopamine systems.
connectivity_summary.zh: 猕猴研究把外侧缰核连接到纹状体-苍白球-缰核环路，并连接到影响多巴胺系统的下游 RMTg 通路。

connectivity_summary.en: Its inclusion is secure at the habenular-system level, yet a macaque-specific connection profile for the exact D99 medial habenular parcel is still not adequately resolved.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它在缰核系统层面的归属是明确的，但针对这一精确 D99 内侧缰核分区的猕猴特异连接画像仍未充分建立。

functional_summary.en: The thalamic reticular nucleus contains specialized inhibitory neurons that sit at the thalamocortical interface and help shape sensory relay processing.
functional_summary.zh: 丘脑网状核位于丘脑-皮层接口处，包含特化的抑制性神经元，并参与塑造感觉中继处理。

connectivity_summary.en: In macaques, reticular neurons are organized with visual-stream specificity and regulate thalamic relay channels rather than acting as a generic thalamic shell.
connectivity_summary.zh: 在猕猴中，网状核神经元表现出视觉通路特异性，并调控丘脑中继通道，而不是一个泛化的丘脑外壳。

functional_summary.en: The paraventricular thalamic nucleus is a macaque midline thalamic hub tied to stress-related and motivational signaling.
functional_summary.zh: 丘脑室旁核是猕猴中线丘脑的一个关键枢纽，与应激相关和动机性信号处理密切相关。

connectivity_summary.en: Tracer work shows Pa connections with accumbens, basal amygdala, lateral septum, hypothalamus, dorsal raphe, and periaqueductal gray, giving it a concrete limbic-subcortical profile.
connectivity_summary.zh: 示踪研究显示 Pa 与伏隔核、基底杏仁核、外侧隔区、下丘脑、背缝核和导水管周围灰质相连，形成了明确的边缘-皮质下连接画像。

functional_summary.en: The superior colliculus is a primate visuomotor structure with direct saccade-related neuronal activity in macaques.
functional_summary.zh: 上丘是灵长类视动结构，在猕猴中具有直接的扫视相关神经活动证据。

functional_summary.en: The inferior colliculus is a macaque auditory midbrain structure with directly mapped frequency-responsive organization.
functional_summary.zh: 下丘是猕猴听觉中脑结构，具有直接绘制出的频率反应组织。

functional_summary.en: The abducens nucleus is directly involved in macaque horizontal saccade control through burst and pause dynamics of its neurons.
functional_summary.zh: 外展核通过其神经元的爆发和停顿动力学，直接参与猕猴水平扫视控制。

connectivity_summary.en: Direct recordings during cerebellar perturbation give the sixth cranial nucleus a concrete oculomotor role.
connectivity_summary.zh: 在小脑扰动条件下的直接记录，使第六脑神经核具备明确的眼动作用。

functional_summary.en: In macaques, retrograde tracer injection into the facial nucleus labels trigeminal sources participating in the blink-reflex circuit.
functional_summary.zh: 在猕猴中，向面神经核注入逆行示踪剂可标记参与眨眼反射环路的三叉来源。

functional_summary.en: Vestibular nuclei contain macaque premotor neurons that combine pursuit and vestibular signals during self-motion.
functional_summary.zh: 前庭核包含猕猴的前运动神经元，可在自身运动中整合追踪和前庭信号。

functional_summary.en: The macaque blink-reflex study identifies neurons in spinal trigeminal pars oralis, interpolaris, and caudalis that project into the facial-nucleus circuit.
functional_summary.zh: 猕猴眨眼反射研究直接识别出投射进入面神经核环路的脊束三叉核口侧部、中间部和尾侧部神经元。

functional_summary.en: The inferior olivary nucleus receives a direct superior-colliculus projection in macaques, placing it in an oculomotor learning-related pathway.
functional_summary.zh: 下橄榄核在猕猴中接受来自上丘的直接投射，使其处于与眼动学习相关的通路中。

functional_summary.en: The superior olivary complex has direct anatomical characterization in juvenile rhesus monkeys, including its major medial and lateral components.
functional_summary.zh: 上橄榄复合体在幼年恒河猴中已有直接解剖学刻画，并明确涉及其主要的内侧和外侧成分。

functional_summary.en: The cochlear nucleus is the first central auditory nucleus and has directly characterized subdivision-specific neurochemical organization in rhesus macaques.
functional_summary.zh: 蜗核是第一个中枢听觉核团，并且在恒河猴中已有直接刻画的亚区特异神经化学组织。

connectivity_summary.en: This is explicit parcel-relevant anatomy from macaques, not a generic cranial-nerve statement.
connectivity_summary.zh: 这是来自猕猴的明确分区相关解剖证据，而不是泛化的脑神经描述。

functional_summary.en: The dorsal motor nucleus of the vagus is directly identified in monkey brainstem motor outflow to laryngeal/vagal targets.
functional_summary.zh: 迷走神经背运动核在猴脑干中可被直接识别为通向喉部和迷走神经目标的运动输出核团。

functional_summary.en: The solitary nucleus carries gustatory responses in alert cynomolgus monkeys.
functional_summary.zh: 孤束核在清醒食蟹猴中表现出味觉反应。

functional_summary.en: The nucleus prepositus participates in macaque gaze control through premotor neurons that integrate pursuit and vestibular signals.
functional_summary.zh: 舌下前置核通过整合追踪和前庭信号的前运动神经元参与猕猴凝视控制。

functional_summary.en: Single-neuron recordings in awake monkeys directly characterize limb-state coding in the cuneate nucleus.
functional_summary.zh: 在清醒猴中进行的单神经元记录直接刻画了楔束核中的肢体状态编码。

functional_summary.en: Monkey recordings directly characterize proprioceptive relay neurons in the external/lateral cuneate nucleus during controlled forearm-muscle stretch.
functional_summary.zh: 猴实验直接记录了外侧/外楔束核中对前臂肌肉牵张作出反应的本体感觉中继神经元。

functional_summary.en: The dentate nucleus is the major cerebellar output node for planning, timing, and nonmotor as well as motor operations.
functional_summary.zh: 齿状核是小脑的重要输出节点，参与计划、时序，以及运动和非运动操作。

connectivity_summary.en: It projects through thalamus to motor and prefrontal cortex, extending cerebellar influence into distributed cerebrocerebellar loops.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它经丘脑投向运动和前额叶皮层，把小脑影响扩展到分布式脑-小脑环路。

functional_summary.en: The fastigial nucleus is a cerebellar output node directly implicated in primate saccadic control.
functional_summary.zh: 顶核是小脑输出节点，直接参与灵长类扫视控制。

connectivity_summary.en: In macaques, caudal fastigial neurons project bilaterally to the rostral intermediate gray of superior colliculus, giving FN a clear output signature.
connectivity_summary.zh: 在猕猴中，尾侧顶核神经元双侧投向上丘吻侧中间灰质层，使 FN 具备清晰的输出特征。

connectivity_summary.en: Its defensible interpretation remains motor-thalamic membership without a sufficiently specific macaque connection profile for VLps itself.
connectivity_summary.zh: 当前最稳妥的解释仍是其属于运动丘脑体系，但针对 VLps 本身仍缺少足够特异的猕猴连接画像。

connectivity_summary.en: Its checked connectivity is best described as intralaminar-network rather than uniquely parcel-specific, so CL remains sparse after review.
connectivity_summary.zh: 当前已核查连接最适合表述为板内网络级，而非独属于该分区，因此 CL 在复核后仍保持 sparse。

connectivity_summary.en: The safest summary is shared intralaminar participation with unresolved parcel-specific borders, rather than an overclaimed independent profile.
connectivity_summary.zh: 当前最稳妥的表述是其共享板内网络功能，但分区级边界仍未解析，而不是夸大为独立画像。

connectivity_summary.en: Its documented pontocerebellar input places Crus II within a specific visual-to-cerebellar route.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其已记录的桥脑-小脑输入把 Crus II 放入一条明确的视觉到小脑通路中。

functional_summary.en: The lateral paraflocculus is tied to visuomotor cerebellar processing in macaques through direct visual pontocerebellar input.
functional_summary.zh: 外侧旁绒球通过直接的视觉桥脑-小脑输入，与猕猴的视动性小脑处理相关。

functional_summary.en: The flocculus is directly required for smooth pursuit and adaptive vestibulo-ocular control in macaques.
functional_summary.zh: 绒球在猕猴中直接参与平滑追踪和前庭-眼反射的适应性调控。

connectivity_summary.en: Macaque tracer studies place AD within the anterior-thalamic cingulo-retrosplenial network rather than as an undifferentiated anterior nucleus.
connectivity_summary.zh: 猕猴示踪研究把 AD 放在前丘脑-扣带-后扣带旁网络中，而不是一个未分化的前丘脑核团。

connectivity_summary.en: Its checked role is best described as CL-PC intralaminar network membership with unresolved separation from neighboring nuclei.
connectivity_summary.zh: 当前最稳妥的连接表述是其属于 CL-PC 板内网络，但与邻近核团之间的分离仍未充分解析。

functional_summary.en: The periaqueductal gray is a macaque midbrain structure with direct cortical projections from rostral dorsal and medial prefrontal cortex.
functional_summary.zh: 导水管周围灰质是猕猴中脑结构，直接接受来自吻侧背侧和内侧前额叶皮层的投射。

functional_summary.en: Reversible inactivation of the interstitial nucleus of Cajal in monkeys produces characteristic torsional and vertical eye-head deficits.
functional_summary.zh: 在猴中可逆失活 Cajal 间质核会产生特征性的扭转和垂直眼-头运动缺陷。

functional_summary.en: The ventral tegmental area has a direct causal role in primate reinforcement and motivation.
functional_summary.zh: 腹侧被盖区在灵长类强化和动机中具有直接因果作用。

functional_summary.en: Pontine nuclei receive organized cortical input from visual and parietal territories in macaques.
functional_summary.zh: 桥核在猕猴中接受来自视觉和顶叶领地的有组织皮层输入。

connectivity_summary.en: The safest interpretation remains regional membership within hypothalamic regulation rather than a direct parcel-specific profile.
connectivity_summary.zh: 当前最稳妥的解释仍是其属于下丘脑调控区域，而不是已经具备直接的分区级画像。

functional_summary.en: The paraventricular hypothalamic nucleus is a primate neuroendocrine center containing magnocellular oxytocin and vasopressin neurons.
functional_summary.zh: 下丘脑室旁核是灵长类神经内分泌中枢，包含大细胞性催产素和加压素神经元。

functional_summary.en: The supraoptic nucleus is a primate magnocellular neuroendocrine nucleus rich in oxytocin and vasopressin neurons.
functional_summary.zh: 视上核是灵长类的大细胞性神经内分泌核团，富含催产素和加压素神经元。

functional_summary.en: The suprachiasmatic nucleus is the primate circadian pacemaker and shows nucleus-specific monoaminergic innervation.
functional_summary.zh: 视交叉上核是灵长类昼夜节律起搏器，并具有核团特异的单胺能支配。

functional_summary.en: The ventromedial hypothalamic nucleus is anatomically resolved in rhesus macaques, but the checked corpus still does not justify a strong macaque parcel-specific claim.
functional_summary.zh: 腹内侧下丘脑核在恒河猴中具有清晰解剖边界，但当前已核查文献仍不足以支撑强的猕猴分区级结论。

functional_summary.en: The arcuate nucleus is a primate neuroendocrine hub in which kisspeptin/KNDy-related signaling is directly documented in rhesus macaques.
functional_summary.zh: 弓状核是灵长类神经内分泌枢纽，在恒河猴中已有直接证据显示其存在 kisspeptin/KNDy 相关信号。

connectivity_summary.en: It remains sparse rather than being generalized from broader raphe-system literature.
connectivity_summary.zh: 因此它继续保持 sparse，而不是从更宽泛的缝核系统文献中泛化。

functional_summary.en: The nucleus reticularis tegmenti pontis receives frontal cortical and subcortical input in macaques and changes its discharge during saccade adaptation.
functional_summary.zh: 桥被盖网状核在猕猴中接受额叶皮层及皮层下输入，并在扫视适应过程中改变放电。

functional_summary.en: In primates, negative reward signals from the lateral habenula are relayed to dopamine neurons through the rostromedial tegmental nucleus.
functional_summary.zh: 在灵长类中，来自外侧缰核的负性奖赏信号会经由喙内侧被盖核传递到多巴胺神经元。

functional_summary.en: In marmosets, the parabigeminal nucleus sends direct projections to koniocellular layers of the lateral geniculate nucleus.
functional_summary.zh: 在狨猴中，旁双丘核会向外侧膝状体的 koniocellular 层发出直接投射。

functional_summary.en: In macaques, the posterior hypothalamic area receives direct projections from the medial vestibular nucleus.
functional_summary.zh: 在猕猴中，后下丘脑区接受来自内侧前庭核的直接投射。

connectivity_summary.en: Its checked profile is therefore extended-amygdala membership with unresolved parcel-specific specialization.
connectivity_summary.zh: 因此其复核结论仍是属于延伸杏仁核体系，但分区级特化尚未充分解析。

functional_summary.en: The lateral bed nucleus of the stria terminalis central subdivision belongs to the primate central extended amygdala and is directly connected with the central amygdala.
functional_summary.zh: 终纹床核外侧部中央亚区属于灵长类中央延伸杏仁核，并与中央杏仁核直接相连。

functional_summary.en: The dorsal bed nucleus has direct primate extended-amygdala relevance, but the current corpus still does not cleanly separate this exact parcel from adjacent BNST territories.
functional_summary.zh: 背侧终纹床核与灵长类延伸杏仁核有直接关联，但当前文献仍不能把这一精确分区与邻近 BNST 领地清晰区分开。

connectivity_summary.en: The checked conclusion is cholinergic-system membership without parcel-specific maturity.
connectivity_summary.zh: 当前复核结论是其属于胆碱能系统，但尚未达到分区级成熟度。

functional_summary.en: Ch4 intermedio-ventral division is an NBM-related parcel, but the current macaque literature still resolves the parent system better than this exact subdivision.
functional_summary.zh: Ch4 中间腹侧部是与 NBM 相关的分区，但当前猕猴文献对其母系统的解析仍明显优于对这一精确亚区的解析。

functional_summary.en: The locus coeruleus causally contributes to visual-spatial attention in macaques through norepinephrine-dependent gain control.
functional_summary.zh: 蓝斑核通过去甲肾上腺素依赖的增益控制，因果性参与猕猴的视空间注意。

functional_summary.en: The parabrachial nucleus contains macaque neurons responsive to whole-body rotational stimulation.
functional_summary.zh: 臂旁核包含对全身旋转刺激作出反应的猕猴神经元。

functional_summary.en: The dorsal paraflocculus is the principal macaque cerebellar target of visual pontine input identified in tracer studies.
functional_summary.zh: 背侧旁绒球是猕猴示踪研究中识别出的视觉桥脑输入主要小脑靶点。

connectivity_summary.en: This gives dPFl a direct visual-cerebellar connectivity signature rather than only a generic parafloccular label.
connectivity_summary.zh: 这使 dPFl 具备直接的视觉-小脑连接特征，而不只是泛化的旁绒球标签。

functional_summary.en: The ventral paraflocculus is part of the floccular complex required for smooth pursuit and adaptive vestibulo-ocular control in macaques.
functional_summary.zh: 腹侧旁绒球属于绒球复合体，参与猕猴平滑追踪和前庭-眼反射适应。

functional_summary.en: The dorsal raphe nucleus carries reward-expectation and task-progress signals in behaving monkeys.
functional_summary.zh: 背缝核在行为猕猴中编码奖赏预期和任务进程信号。

functional_summary.en: The dorsal tegmental nucleus of Gudden is directly demonstrated in macaques as a source of projections to the mammillary body region.
functional_summary.zh: Gudden 背侧被盖核在猕猴中已被直接证明会向乳头体区域发出投射。

functional_summary.en: The ambiguus nucleus contains monkey motoneurons innervating laryngeal targets.
functional_summary.zh: 疑核包含支配喉部目标的猴类运动神经元。

functional_summary.en: The lateral reticular nucleus receives a direct corticofugal projection in monkeys, with clear topographic organization from limb motor cortex.
functional_summary.zh: 外侧网状核在猴中接受直接的皮质下行投射，并表现出来自肢体运动皮层的清晰拓扑组织。

functional_summary.en: Area 11l is directly included in macaque orbitofrontal value-related responses during object processing.
functional_summary.zh: 11l 在猕猴中被直接纳入物体加工中的眶额价值相关反应。

functional_summary.en: The central amygdala is a major output nucleus for coordinating autonomic and behavioral responses to salient affective signals.
functional_summary.zh: 中央杏仁核是协调显著情感信号所引发的自主神经和行为反应的重要输出核团。

connectivity_summary.en: It receives processed amygdalar information and links strongly to hypothalamic and brainstem effectors.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它接收杏仁核内部处理后的信息，并强烈连接下丘脑和脑干效应系统。

functional_summary.en: Area 14r is directly included in the macaque medial prefrontal network defined by tracer injections into architectonic areas.
functional_summary.zh: 14r 被直接纳入通过示踪注射定义的猕猴内侧前额叶网络。

functional_summary.en: Area 13b is explicitly named in macaque orbital prefrontal connectional networks as a central orbital field.
functional_summary.zh: 13b 在猕猴眶额连接网络摘要中被直接点名为中央眶额区。

connectivity_summary.en: It belongs to the lateral amygdala territory embedded in hierarchical amygdala circuits linking cortex with striatal outputs.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它属于外侧杏仁核区域，嵌入连接皮层与纹状体输出的分层杏仁核环路中。

connectivity_summary.en: Anterior inferotemporal inputs reach area 36 broadly, and the caudal 36 subdivision participates in the perirhinal route into medial temporal cortex.
connectivity_summary.zh: 前下颞输入进入 36 区整体，尾侧 36 亚区属于通向内侧颞叶皮层的嗅周通路组成部分。

functional_summary.en: The caudal parabelt is a distinct macaque auditory-cortical subdivision defined by topographic connections with belt cortex and by limited direct core input.
functional_summary.zh: 尾侧旁带区是独立的猕猴听觉皮层亚区，具有与 belt 皮层的拓扑连接，并且几乎不直接接受 core 输入。

connectivity_summary.en: Its callosal and belt-linked connectivity places CPB as a higher-order auditory stage beyond core cortex.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其胼胝体和 belt 相关连接把 CPB 放在高于 core 皮层的听觉处理层级上。

functional_summary.en: Area 29 is a directly defined macaque retrosplenial subdivision within the posterior cingulate region.
functional_summary.zh: 29 区是在猕猴后扣带区域中被直接界定的后压部亚区。

functional_summary.en: Area 13L in macaques shows direct electrophysiological changes in pyramidal neurons after long-term alcohol drinking.
functional_summary.zh: 猕猴 13L 区在长期饮酒后表现出锥体神经元直接电生理变化。

functional_summary.en: CA1 is a hippocampal output stage essential for episodic memory processing and comparison of current input with stored context.
functional_summary.zh: CA1 是海马输出阶段，对情景记忆处理以及当前输入和既有情境的比较很关键。

connectivity_summary.en: The literature places V4 within the ventral visual stream and as a major source of input to inferior temporal cortex.
connectivity_summary.zh: 文献将 V4 置于腹侧视觉通路中，并指出其是下颞皮层的重要输入来源。

connectivity_summary.en: It participates in lateral-amygdala channels within broader cortico-amygdala-striatal organization.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它参与更大范围皮层-杏仁核-纹状体组织中的外侧杏仁核通道。

functional_summary.en: Posterior cingulate area 31 belongs to a medial association network involved in contextual integration, orienting, and internally directed cognition.
functional_summary.zh: 后扣带 31 区属于内侧联合网络，参与情境整合、定向以及内源性认知。

connectivity_summary.en: It communicates with medial temporal, parietal, and prefrontal territories, linking memory-related information with large-scale cortical state.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它与内侧颞叶、顶叶和前额叶区域沟通，把记忆相关信息接入大尺度皮层状态。

connectivity_summary.en: Granular insula also projects preferentially toward more sensorimotor striatal territories.
connectivity_summary.zh: 颗粒岛叶还优先投射到更偏感觉运动的纹状体区域。

functional_summary.en: ML is a macaque lateral-belt field adjacent to A1 and shows direct neuronal encoding of amplitude modulation and frequency-modulated sounds.
functional_summary.zh: ML 是紧邻 A1 的猕猴外侧 belt 区，并具有对调幅和调频声音的直接神经编码证据。

functional_summary.en: ER is a rostral entorhinal subdivision that can be distinguished anatomically from other macaque entorhinal fields.
functional_summary.zh: ER 是内嗅皮层的吻侧亚区，可在猕猴中与其他内嗅分区解剖学区分。

connectivity_summary.en: Perirhinal inputs terminate heavily in ER, placing it on the rostral entorhinal receiving route from temporal association cortex.
connectivity_summary.zh: 嗅周输入在 ER 中终止较重，使其处于来自颞叶联合皮层的吻侧内嗅接收通路上。

functional_summary.en: Area 10o is directly identified in macaque medial prefrontal network organization alongside 11m and other medial fields.
functional_summary.zh: 10o 在猕猴内侧前额叶网络组织中与 11m 等内侧区一起被直接识别。

connectivity_summary.en: Its neurons combine visual and vestibular cues for self-motion discrimination.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其神经元会结合视觉和前庭线索来进行自运动辨别。

connectivity_summary.en: It receives ascending vestibular pathways and participates with anterior LIP in intraparietal 3D processing.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它接收上行前庭通路，并与前部 LIP 一起参与顶内沟三维处理。

connectivity_summary.en: It participates in the organized accessory-basal network receiving convergent anterior cingulate afferents.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它参与有组织的副基底核网络，并接收汇聚的前扣带传入。

connectivity_summary.en: Within the visual hierarchy, V1 provides the principal cortical entry point that feeds multiple extrastriate pathways.
connectivity_summary.zh: 在视觉层级中，V1 是进入皮层视觉系统的主要入口，并向多个纹外通路提供输入。

functional_summary.en: Area G is directly identified in macaques as primary gustatory cortex with taste-responsive activity.
functional_summary.zh: G 区已在猕猴中被直接识别为初级味觉皮层，并表现出味觉响应。

connectivity_summary.en: Its responses appear together with adjacent anterior insula and orbitofrontal area 12o during gustatory stimulation.
connectivity_summary.zh: 在味觉刺激期间，它与邻近前岛叶和眶额 12o 区一起出现反应。

connectivity_summary.en: It sits in the ordered basal-nucleus flow from dorsal to intermediate to more ventral modules.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它位于基底核从背侧到中间、再到更腹侧模块的有序信息流中。

connectivity_summary.en: It receives strong parietal, motor, and cingulate afferents consistent with goal-directed movement control.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它接收强烈的顶叶、运动和扣带传入，符合目标导向运动控制的功能。

connectivity_summary.en: It projects to ventrocaudal striatum, amygdala, and medial temporal structures, including documented reciprocal linkage with CA1.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它投射到腹尾侧纹状体、杏仁核和内侧颞叶结构，并与 CA1 存在已报道的互联。

functional_summary.en: Area 32 in rhesus macaques directly links dorsolateral prefrontal cortex with subgenual area 25 through serial prefrontal pathways.
functional_summary.zh: 在恒河猴中，32 区通过串联的前额叶通路直接连接背外侧前额叶皮层与膝下 25 区。

functional_summary.en: AL neurons in rhesus macaques show selective responses to slower frequency-modulated sweeps, consistent with communication-sound processing.
functional_summary.zh: 在恒河猴中，AL 神经元对较慢的调频扫频具有选择性反应，符合其参与交流声音处理的角色。

functional_summary.en: Area 8Av/45 in macaques directly encodes task-relevant visual color information during match-to-sample behavior.
functional_summary.zh: 猕猴 8Av/45 在匹配任务中直接编码与任务相关的视觉颜色信息。

functional_summary.en: ECL is a caudal-limiting entorhinal subdivision with a distinct macaque laminar profile.
functional_summary.zh: ECL 是内嗅皮层的尾侧限制亚区，在猕猴中具有独立的层次特征。

connectivity_summary.en: Cortical afferent mapping shows ECL as part of the caudal entorhinal receiving territory, including strong retrosplenial-related input.
connectivity_summary.zh: 皮层传入定位显示 ECL 属于尾侧内嗅接收区，并包含明显的后扣带/压后相关输入。

connectivity_summary.en: It is embedded in the temporal motion network and also appears within the mid-STS attention-sensitive complex.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它位于颞叶运动网络中，也属于中 STS 的注意敏感复合体。

connectivity_summary.en: It sends a dense bilateral projection to caudal entorhinal cortex, with a defined laminar termination pattern.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它向尾侧内嗅皮层发出致密双侧投射，并具有明确的层次终止模式。

functional_summary.en: Area 12m is explicitly named within macaque orbital prefrontal connectional networks.
functional_summary.zh: 12m 在猕猴眶额连接网络摘要中被直接点名。

connectivity_summary.en: Its afferent connections place it between visual and parietofrontal sensorimotor networks rather than as a purely visual endpoint.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其传入连接把它置于视觉网络与顶额感觉运动网络之间，而不是一个纯视觉终点。

connectivity_summary.en: It belongs to the accessory-basal network receiving convergent anterior cingulate inputs.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它属于接收汇聚前扣带输入的副基底核网络。

functional_summary.en: F1/area 4 is the primary motor output field, encoding movement parameters and issuing corticospinal commands for voluntary action.
functional_summary.zh: F1/4 区是主要运动输出场，编码运动参数并发出皮质脊髓指令以完成自主动作。

connectivity_summary.en: It is embedded in frontal motor loops with premotor cortex, supplementary motor fields, thalamus, and basal ganglia.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它嵌在由前运动皮层、辅助运动区、丘脑与基底节组成的额叶运动环路中。

connectivity_summary.en: Visual and occasional auditory responses were recorded across SII and adjacent opercular regions.
connectivity_summary.zh: 在 SII 及邻近岛盖区记录到了视觉反应和少量听觉反应。

functional_summary.en: Area 13m is directly named in macaque orbital prefrontal connectional networks.
functional_summary.zh: 13m 在猕猴眶额连接网络摘要中被直接点名。

functional_summary.en: Medial area 9 (9m) receives direct cerebellar-thalamic projections in primates.
functional_summary.zh: 内侧 9 区（9m）在灵长类中接受直接的小脑-丘脑投射。

connectivity_summary.en: Perirhinal afferents extend into rostral EI, while additional cortical inputs vary along the EI axis.
connectivity_summary.zh: 嗅周传入可延伸至吻侧 EI，而其他皮层输入则沿 EI 轴呈现差异。

functional_summary.en: The rostral parabelt is directly identified in macaques as a parabelt subdivision with strong homotopic callosal connectivity.
functional_summary.zh: 吻侧旁带区在猕猴中被直接识别为旁带亚区，并具有强烈的同位胼胝体连接。

functional_summary.en: Area 13a is directly identified as an interaction node linking orbital and medial prefrontal networks in macaques.
functional_summary.zh: 13a 在猕猴中被直接识别为连接眶额与内侧前额叶网络的交互节点。

functional_summary.en: F3/SMA contributes to internally generated action plans, sequencing, and coordination across limbs.
functional_summary.zh: F3/SMA 参与内源性动作计划、序列组织与跨肢体协调。

connectivity_summary.en: It links motor cortex with medial frontal, basal-ganglia, and thalamic circuits that shape self-initiated behavior.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它把运动皮层与内侧额叶、基底节和丘脑环路连接起来，塑造自发行为。

functional_summary.en: Area R is a macaque core auditory field that receives dominant thalamic input from the ventral medial geniculate division.
functional_summary.zh: R 区是猕猴 core 听觉区，主要接受来自内侧膝状体腹侧部的丘脑输入。

connectivity_summary.en: Its placement in the serial AI-to-R-to-RT pathway gives it a concrete core-cortex role.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其位于 AI-R-RT 串联系统中，具有明确的 core 皮层角色。

functional_summary.en: V6 is a macaque parieto-occipital visual area with a retinotopic representation of the contralateral hemifield.
functional_summary.zh: V6 是猕猴顶枕区的视觉区，具有对侧半视野的视网膜拓扑表征。

functional_summary.en: The ventral part of macaque area 46 is directly shown to be connectionally heterogeneous, with distinct rostral and caudal fields.
functional_summary.zh: 猕猴 46 区腹侧部被直接证明具有连接异质性，并可分为不同的吻侧和尾侧区段。

connectivity_summary.en: Its connectivity links visual, somatic, mesial, and frontal fields for limb-action control.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其连接把视觉、躯体、内侧和额叶区域联系起来，以支持肢体动作控制。

functional_summary.en: Area 35 is a perirhinal component directly implicated in macaque visual recognition memory circuits.
functional_summary.zh: 35 区是嗅周皮层组成部分，直接参与猕猴视觉识别记忆环路。

functional_summary.en: A1 is the primary-like macaque auditory core field and receives overwhelmingly ventral-MGN thalamic input.
functional_summary.zh: A1 是猕猴初级样 core 听觉区，并主要接受来自内侧膝状体腹侧部的丘脑输入。

connectivity_summary.en: It is one of the agranular subdivisions most strongly linking visceral, gustatory, and olfactory information to ventral striatal circuits.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它是最强烈把内脏、味觉和嗅觉信息接入腹侧纹状体环路的无颗粒亚区之一。

functional_summary.en: The subiculum is a major hippocampal output field in macaques.
functional_summary.zh: 下托是猕猴海马形成中的重要输出区。

connectivity_summary.en: It projects topographically to entorhinal cortex and also contributes direct hippocampal efferents toward temporal cortex.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它按拓扑关系投射到内嗅皮层，也参与通向颞叶皮层的直接海马输出。

connectivity_summary.en: Cortical afferent mapping places EC in the caudal entorhinal input territory, distinct from rostral fields.
connectivity_summary.zh: 皮层传入定位显示 EC 属于尾侧内嗅输入区，与吻侧分区不同。

connectivity_summary.en: Dysgranular insular stripes align with tract-tracing boundaries and occupy an intermediate position in insula-to-striatum organization.
connectivity_summary.zh: 异颗粒岛叶条带与示踪边界相吻合，并位于岛叶到纹状体组织中的中间层级。

connectivity_summary.en: It receives ascending vestibular inputs relevant for body-state updating and online movement guidance.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它接收与身体状态更新和在线运动引导相关的上行前庭输入。

connectivity_summary.en: Its activity participates in object acquisition together with area 5 and AIP.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其活动与 5 区和 AIP 一起参与物体获取。

functional_summary.en: Area 44 is directly included in macaque caudal ventrolateral prefrontal connection studies that distinguish neighboring 45A and 45B networks.
functional_summary.zh: 44 区被直接纳入猕猴尾侧腹外侧前额叶连接研究，并与邻近的 45A、45B 网络相区分。

connectivity_summary.en: Its inputs include direct V1 projections and indirect routes through earlier visual areas, matching its place in the dorsal motion pathway.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其输入包括来自 V1 的直接投射以及经早期视觉区的间接通路，这与其在背侧运动通路中的位置相吻合。

functional_summary.en: TEm is a defined lower-bank STS field in macaques.
functional_summary.zh: TEm 是猕猴上颞沟下岸的明确分区。

connectivity_summary.en: TEO sends feedforward projections to TEm, placing it in the downstream visual association route from posterior inferotemporal cortex.
connectivity_summary.zh: TEO 向 TEm 发出前馈投射，使其位于来自后部下颞皮层的视觉联合通路下游。

connectivity_summary.en: It is also the macaque cytoarchitectural homolog of a planum-temporale region assessed for hemispheric asymmetry.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它也是猕猴中与颞平面同源、可用于半球不对称评估的细胞构筑区。

connectivity_summary.en: It interfaces with prefrontal, premotor, limbic, and autonomic systems, allowing internal state to bias control policies.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它与前额叶、前运动、边缘及自主神经系统相接，使内部状态能够影响控制策略。

connectivity_summary.en: Its responses extend beyond optic-flow processing into category and working-memory related computations.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其反应已经超出视流处理，延伸到类别和工作记忆相关计算。

connectivity_summary.en: It lies downstream of the rostral auditory core cascade extending from AI through RT and RTp.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它位于从 AI 经 RT、RTp 向前延伸的吻侧听觉核心级联下游。

connectivity_summary.en: Its activity reflects preparation and execution signals within the medial premotor system.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其活动反映了内侧前运动系统中的准备和执行信号。

functional_summary.en: Area 12r is directly identified in macaque ventrolateral prefrontal connectivity work as a frontal partner of 45A and 45B.
functional_summary.zh: 12r 在猕猴腹外侧前额叶连接研究中被直接识别为 45A 和 45B 的前额叶连接伙伴。

connectivity_summary.en: Its connectivity places it in a hand and face/mouth action-control network with limbic influences.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其连接把它置于一个带有边缘系统影响的手部和口面动作控制网络中。

connectivity_summary.en: It participates in object acquisition and 3D-shape extraction for hand actions.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它参与物体获取以及用于手部动作的三维形状提取。

functional_summary.en: RTp is directly distinguished in macaques as a rostral auditory extension with medial-geniculate input different from adjacent auditory-related STGr cortex.
functional_summary.zh: RTp 在猕猴中被直接区分为一个吻侧听觉延伸区，其内侧膝状体输入模式不同于邻近的听觉相关 STGr 皮层。

functional_summary.en: Subgenual area 25 in rhesus macaques receives serial input from area 32 in a circuit balancing cognition and emotion.
functional_summary.zh: 在恒河猴中，膝下 25 区接受来自 32 区的串联输入，参与平衡认知与情绪的环路。

connectivity_summary.en: Its posterior subdivision contributes projections to ventral striatal compartments within the olfactory corticostriatal pathway.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其后部亚区参与嗅觉皮层-纹状体通路中的腹侧纹状体投射。

connectivity_summary.en: It is one of the strongest agranular contributors carrying processed visceral and gustatory information into ventral striatal circuits.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它是把加工后的内脏和味觉信息送入腹侧纹状体环路的最强无颗粒贡献区之一。

functional_summary.en: RT is part of the macaque core auditory sequence linking AI and R to more rostral supratemporal-plane fields.
functional_summary.zh: RT 是猕猴 core 听觉序列的一部分，把 AI 和 R 与更吻侧的上颞平面区域连接起来。

functional_summary.en: 7a is a macaque parietal association field with visual and oculomotor response dominance.
functional_summary.zh: 7a 是猕猴顶叶联合区，以视觉和眼动反应占优势。

connectivity_summary.en: This distinguishes it from the more somatically weighted neighboring 7b field.
connectivity_summary.zh: 这使其有别于更偏躯体表征的邻近 7b 区。

connectivity_summary.en: It shows sensitivity to planar surface orientation, although fine slant-choice signals are stronger in CIP than in V3A.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它对平面朝向敏感，但细微倾斜判别相关信号在 CIP 中强于 V3A。

functional_summary.en: Area 45A has a distinct macaque connectivity profile linking frontal, temporal, and auditory parabelt territories.
functional_summary.zh: 45A 在猕猴中具有独特连接画像，连接额叶、颞叶和听觉旁带区。

functional_summary.en: TEO is a posterior inferotemporal visual association area required for visual pattern discrimination in macaques.
functional_summary.zh: TEO 是猕猴后部下颞视觉联合区，对视觉图形辨别很关键。

connectivity_summary.en: It receives inputs from V2-V4 and sends forward projections to TE and several STS regions.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它接收来自 V2-V4 的输入，并向 TE 及多个 STS 区域发出前馈投射。

connectivity_summary.en: Grasping-related neurons in dorsal premotor cortex encode object and hand configuration information.
connectivity_summary.zh: 背侧前运动皮层中的抓握相关神经元会编码物体和手部构型信息。

functional_summary.en: Area 46 is a dorsolateral prefrontal field central to working memory, rule maintenance, and flexible cognitive control.
functional_summary.zh: 46 区是背外侧前额叶核心区，参与工作记忆、规则维持与灵活认知控制。

connectivity_summary.en: Its long-range connections integrate sensory, premotor, and limbic information, placing it between representation and action selection.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它通过长程连接整合感觉、前运动与边缘信息，位于表征和动作选择之间。

functional_summary.en: F5 is a ventral premotor field strongly implicated in grasp shaping and hand-object interaction.
functional_summary.zh: F5 是腹侧前运动区，与抓握成形和手-物交互密切相关。

connectivity_summary.en: It interacts with parietal grasp circuits and primary motor cortex, allowing visual object information to influence hand commands.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它与顶叶抓握环路和初级运动皮层相互作用，使视觉物体信息能够影响手部指令。

functional_summary.en: V2 is a second-stage macaque visual area with stripe-related receptive-field organization and segregated outputs toward higher visual areas.
functional_summary.zh: V2 是猕猴视觉系统的第二级区域，具有与条带相关的受体野组织，并向更高级视觉区发出分离的输出。

connectivity_summary.en: Its documented output segregation toward MT and V4 makes V2 a branch point between dorsal and ventral visual processing streams.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其通向 MT 与 V4 的分离输出表明，V2 是背侧与腹侧视觉处理通路之间的重要分流节点。

functional_summary.en: Area 12l is directly named in macaque caudal ventrolateral prefrontal connectivity maps and is strongly linked with areas 45A and 45B.
functional_summary.zh: 12l 在猕猴尾侧腹外侧前额叶连接图中被直接点名，并与 45A、45B 强烈相连。

connectivity_summary.en: Area 3a has a complete representation of deep receptors and musculature that mirrors area 3b topography.
connectivity_summary.zh: 3a 区具有完整的深部受体和肌肉表征，并在拓扑上与 3b 区相呼应。

connectivity_summary.en: Its cellular phenotype aligns it with ventral periamygdaloid and paralaminar territories.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其细胞表型使其与腹侧杏仁核周皮层和旁层区相呼应。

functional_summary.en: Area TF contributes to contextual memory in macaques within the parahippocampal system.
functional_summary.zh: TF 区是猕猴海马旁系统中参与情境记忆的区域。

connectivity_summary.en: It also has direct cortical connectivity with inferior temporal area TEO, linking parahippocampal cortex to ventral visual association cortex.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它还与下颞 TEO 区存在直接皮层连接，把海马旁皮层接入腹侧视觉联合系统。

functional_summary.en: Area 45B is directly distinguished from 45A in macaques by its stronger oculomotor-frontal connectivity profile.
functional_summary.zh: 45B 在猕猴中通过更强的眼动-额叶连接画像与 45A 被直接区分开来。

connectivity_summary.en: It projects to ventrocaudal striatum and deep amygdaloid nuclei, demonstrating a distinct anterior TE output pattern.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它投射到腹尾侧纹状体和深部杏仁核，显示出前部 TE 的独特输出模式。

connectivity_summary.en: It belongs to the superior temporal polysensory complex recruited during attention and action observation.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它属于在注意和动作观察中被招募的上颞多感觉复合体。

functional_summary.en: The basal amygdala is a major association nucleus for evaluating biologically significant cues and assigning affective value.
functional_summary.zh: 基底杏仁核是评估生物学重要线索并赋予情感价值的重要联合核团。

connectivity_summary.en: It exchanges dense signals with prefrontal, temporal, and hippocampal systems, coupling valuation to memory and control.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它与前额叶、颞叶和海马系统密集互联，把价值评估接到记忆与控制上。

functional_summary.en: Area 12o is directly included in macaque ventrolateral prefrontal connection maps that differentiate neighboring 45A and 45B circuits.
functional_summary.zh: 12o 被直接纳入猕猴腹外侧前额叶连接图，并用于区分邻近的 45A、45B 环路。

functional_summary.en: CM in macaques receives a characteristic mix of thalamic inputs from MGad, MGv, MGm, and multisensory nuclei.
functional_summary.zh: 在猕猴中，CM 接受来自 MGad、MGv、MGm 以及多感觉核团的特征性丘脑输入组合。

functional_summary.en: TAa is a defined upper-bank STS field in macaques.
functional_summary.zh: TAa 是猕猴上颞沟上岸的明确分区。

connectivity_summary.en: It receives projections from inferotemporal association cortex within the TE-to-STS network.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它接收来自下颞联合皮层的投射，属于 TE 到 STS 的网络。

functional_summary.en: F2 is a dorsal premotor field involved in reach preparation and transforming spatial cues into arm actions.
functional_summary.zh: F2 是背侧前运动区，参与到达动作准备，并把空间线索转换为上肢动作。

connectivity_summary.en: It couples parietal visuomotor inputs to primary motor and thalamic outputs, forming a bridge from perception to action.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它把顶叶视觉运动输入接到初级运动和丘脑输出上，像一座从知觉到动作的桥。

functional_summary.en: The parasubiculum is a defined subicular field in macaques.
functional_summary.zh: 旁下托是猕猴中可明确区分的下托复合体分区。

connectivity_summary.en: It sends a dense projection to caudal entorhinal cortex with a characteristic laminar termination pattern.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它向尾侧内嗅皮层发出致密投射，并具有特征性的层次终止模式。

connectivity_summary.en: It sits within the mid-STS network highlighted by both covert-attention and action-observation studies.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它位于在隐蔽注意和动作观察研究中都被凸显的中 STS 网络内。

functional_summary.en: TEa is a defined lower-bank STS field in macaques.
functional_summary.zh: TEa 是猕猴上颞沟下岸的明确分区。

connectivity_summary.en: TEO projects feedforward to TEa, linking posterior inferotemporal cortex with anterior STS association fields.
connectivity_summary.zh: TEO 向 TEa 发出前馈投射，把后部下颞皮层与前部 STS 联合区连接起来。

connectivity_summary.en: It belongs to the same STS association complex as PGa and TPO.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它与 PGa、TPO 一样属于 STS 联合复合体。

connectivity_summary.en: Its placement within the rostral entorhinal sector links it to cortical afferent patterns distinct from more caudal fields.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其位于吻侧内嗅扇区，使其对应于不同于更尾侧分区的皮层传入模式。

connectivity_summary.en: It is one of the hippocampal-targeted amygdala fields highlighted by bcl-2-positive cell distributions.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它是 bcl-2 阳性细胞分布所凸显的海马靶向杏仁核分区之一。

connectivity_summary.en: Its caudal position places it with the posterior entorhinal input territory rather than the rostral perirhinal-receiving zone.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其尾侧位置使其归入后部内嗅输入区，而不是吻侧嗅周接收区。

connectivity_summary.en: Its topology links claustral zones to cortical and striatal territories participating in common functional networks.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其拓扑结构把屏状核分区与同一功能网络中的皮层和纹状体区域联系起来。

connectivity_summary.en: Its dense immature-neuron population and hippocampal linkage distinguish it from neighboring basal fields.
connectivity_summary.zh: 其致密未成熟神经元群体及与海马的联系，使其有别于邻近基底分区。

connectivity_summary.en: It is described as a medial extension of the basal nucleus onto the cortical surface and is also a hippocampal-targeted amygdala territory.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它被描述为基底核向皮层表面的内侧延伸，同时也是受海马影响的杏仁核区域。

functional_summary.en: Area 30 is the companion macaque retrosplenial subdivision directly delineated beside area 29.
functional_summary.zh: 30 区是与 29 区并列、在猕猴中被直接界定的后压部亚区。

functional_summary.en: Area 24a receives direct cortical afferents in macaque cingulate cortex studies.
functional_summary.zh: 24a 在猕猴扣带皮层研究中接受直接皮层传入。

functional_summary.en: Area 14c is explicitly named in the macaque medial prefrontal network defined by direct connectional tracing.
functional_summary.zh: 14c 在基于直接连接示踪定义的猕猴内侧前额叶网络中被明确点名。

connectivity_summary.en: It contributes projections to the mammillary bodies and to temporal cortex, distinguishing it from neighboring hippocampal fields.
connectivity_summary.zh: 它向乳头体和颞叶皮层发出投射，使其与邻近海马分区可区分。

functional_summary.en: Area TH contributes to contextual memory in macaques as part of the parahippocampal system.
functional_summary.zh: TH 区作为海马旁系统组成部分，参与猕猴的情境记忆。

functional_summary.en: The ventral medial geniculate division is the main macaque thalamic source for core auditory fields AI and R.
functional_summary.zh: 内侧膝状体腹侧部是猕猴 core 听觉区 AI 和 R 的主要丘脑来源。

functional_summary.en: The magnocellular medial geniculate division is directly characterized in rhesus macaques and provides multisensory auditory-thalamic input in the primate auditory system.
functional_summary.zh: 内侧膝状体大细胞部在恒河猴中已有直接刻画，并在灵长类听觉系统中提供多感觉丘脑输入。

connectivity_summary.en: Like Ial and Iapm, it is one of the dominant agranular contributors to caudal ventral striatal circuits.
connectivity_summary.zh: 和 Ial、Iapm 一样，它也是尾侧腹侧纹状体环路中的主要无颗粒输入来源。
